drivers.name: AudioSynth
drivers.description: Software audio synthesizer. Plays tones, musical notes, and short melodies on the server host's default audio output — useful for lab-side audible notifications, robot/CNC feedback tones, and experiment-complete beeps. Four waveforms (sine, square, triangle, sawtooth), volume control, and click-free envelopes.

drivers.name: Midi
drivers.description: Advanced MIDI driver — live input/output with any USB or virtual MIDI device, per-channel filtering, pass-through, internal 24-PPQN clock with transport control, Standard MIDI File (SMF) playback and recording, panic/all-notes-off, and a learn helper for mapping physical controls. Streams incoming events as JSON for scripts and dashboards.

drivers.name: Scpi
drivers.description: Generic SCPI instrument driver — works with any SCPI-compliant device (oscilloscopes, multimeters, function generators, power supplies, spectrum analyzers) over TCP/IP (LXI, raw socket port 5025) or Serial (RS-232/USB). Provides raw query/write access, configurable timeouts, init command sequences, and auto-connect with *IDN? identity query.

drivers.name: SerialProbe
drivers.description: AI-assisted serial protocol reverse-engineering: captures traffic in labelled windows, detects framing and checksums locally, correlates stimulus/response, and exports a working connector config.
